title: ImageAttributes
description: Attributes of a NetBackup backup image

backupId.description: Unique identifier for the backup image

policyName.description: Name of the policy that created this image

clientName.description: Client hostname that was backed up

scheduleName.description: Schedule name that triggered the backup

backupTime.description: Timestamp when the backup was performed

expirationTime.description: Timestamp when the image will expire

kilobytes.description: Total size of the backup image in kilobytes

numberOfFiles.description: Total number of files in the backup image

primaryCopy.description: Primary copy number for the image

copyCount.description: Total number of copies of this image

mediaServer.description: Media server that performed the backup

storageUnit.description: Storage unit where the image is stored

mediaId.description: Media ID where the image resides

compressed.description: Whether the image data is compressed

encrypted.description: Whether the image data is encrypted

retentionLevel.description: Retention level assigned to the image
